lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਕਜ ਮੋਹ ਨਿਘਰਤੁ ਹੈ ਪ੍ਰਾਨੀ ਗੁਰੁ ਨਿਘਰਤ ਕਾਢਿ ਕਢਾਵੈਗੋ ॥
lines.translit: pankaj moh nigharat hai praanee gur nigharat kaadt kadtaavaigo |
lines.english: The mortal beings are sinking in the swamp of emotional attachment; the Guru lifts them up, and saves them from sinking.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰਾਹਿ ਤ੍ਰਾਹਿ ਸਰਨਿ ਜਨ ਆਏ ਗੁਰੁ ਹਾਥੀ ਦੇ ਨਿਕਲਾਵੈਗੋ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: traeh traeh saran jan aae gur haathee de nikalaavaigo |4|
lines.english: Crying, "Save me! Save me!", the humble come to His Sanctuary; the Guru reaches out His Hand, and lifts them up. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਪਨੰਤਰੁ ਸੰਸਾਰੁ ਸਭੁ ਬਾਜੀ ਸਭੁ ਬਾਜੀ ਖੇਲੁ ਖਿਲਾਵੈਗੋ ॥
lines.translit: supanantar sansaar sabh baajee sabh baajee khel khilaavaigo |
lines.english: The whole world is like a game in a dream, all a game. God plays and causes the game to be played.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਹਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਲੈ ਚਾਲਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਦਰਗਹ ਪੈਧਾ ਜਾਵੈਗੋ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: laahaa naam guramat lai chaalahu har daragah paidhaa jaavaigo |5|
lines.english: So earn the Profit of the Naam by following the Guru's Teachings; you shall go to the Court of the Lord in robes of honor. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਕਰੈ ਕਰਾਵੈ ਹਉਮੈ ਪਾਪ ਕੋਇਲੇ ਆਨਿ ਜਮਾਵੈਗੋ ॥
lines.translit: haumai karai karaavai haumai paap koeile aan jamaavaigo |
lines.english: They act in egotism, and make others act in egotism; they collect and gather up the blackness of sin.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਇਆ ਕਾਲੁ ਦੁਖਦਾਈ ਹੋਏ ਜੋ ਬੀਜੇ ਸੋ ਖਵਲਾਵੈਗੋ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: aaeaa kaal dukhadaaee hoe jo beeje so khavalaavaigo |6|
lines.english: And when death comes, they suffer in agony; they must eat what they have planted. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤਹੁ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਨੁ ਸੰਚਹੁ ਲੈ ਖਰਚੁ ਚਲੇ ਪਤਿ ਪਾਵੈਗੋ ॥
lines.translit: santahu raam naam dhan sanchahu lai kharach chale pat paavaigo |
lines.english: O Saints, gather the Wealth of the Lord's Name; if you depart after packing these provisions, you shall be honored.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਾਇ ਖਰਚਿ ਦੇਵਹਿ ਬਹੁਤੇਰਾ ਹਰਿ ਦੇਦੇ ਤੋਟਿ ਨ ਆਵੈਗੋ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: khaae kharach deveh bahuteraa har dede tott na aavaigo |7|
lines.english: So eat, spend, consume and give abundantly; the Lord will give - there will be no deficiency. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਧਨੁ ਹੈ ਰਿਦ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਧਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਸਰਣਾਈ ਪਾਵੈਗੋ ॥
lines.translit: raam naam dhan hai rid antar dhan gur saranaaee paavaigo |
lines.english: The wealth of the Lord's Name is deep within the heart. In the Sanctuary of the Guru, this wealth is found.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਦਇਆ ਦਇਆ ਕਰਿ ਦੀਨੀ ਦੁਖੁ ਦਾਲਦੁ ਭੰਜਿ ਸਮਾਵੈਗੋ ॥੮॥੫॥
lines.translit: naanak deaa deaa kar deenee dukh daalad bhanj samaavaigo |8|5|
lines.english: O Nanak, God has been kind and compassionate; He has blessed me. Removing pain and poverty, He has blended me with Himself. ||8||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸਰਨਿ ਧਿਆਵੈਗੋ ॥
lines.translit: man satigur saran dhiaavaigo |
lines.english: O mind, seek the Sanctuary of the True Guru, and meditate.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਨੜਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: kaanarraa mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Kaanraa, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੋਹਾ ਹਿਰਨੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਪਾਰਸ ਗੁਨੁ ਪਾਰਸ ਕੋ ਹੋਇ ਆਵੈਗੋ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: lohaa hiran hovai sang paaras gun paaras ko hoe aavaigo |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Iron is transformed into gold by touching the philosopher's stone; it takes on its qualities. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਮਹਾ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਹੈ ਪਾਰਸੁ ਜੋ ਲਾਗੈ ਸੋ ਫਲੁ ਪਾਵੈਗੋ ॥
lines.translit: satigur mahaa purakh hai paaras jo laagai so fal paavaigo |
lines.english: The True Guru, the Great Primal Being, is the philosopher's stone. Whoever is attached to Him receives fruitful rewards.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਗੁਰ ਉਪਦੇਸਿ ਤਰੇ ਪ੍ਰਹਿਲਾਦਾ ਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਕ ਪੈਜ ਰਖਾਵੈਗੋ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jiau gur upades tare prahilaadaa gur sevak paij rakhaavaigo |1|
lines.english: Just as Prahlaad was saved by the Guru's Teachings, the Guru protects the honor of His servant. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਬਚਨੁ ਬਚਨੁ ਹੈ ਨੀਕੋ ਗੁਰ ਬਚਨੀ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਪਾਵੈਗੋ ॥
lines.translit: satigur bachan bachan hai neeko gur bachanee amrit paavaigo |
lines.english: The Word of the True Guru is the most Sublime and Noble Word. Through the Guru's Word, the Ambrosial Nectar is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਅੰਬਰੀਕਿ ਅਮਰਾ ਪਦ ਪਾਏ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਮੁਖ ਬਚਨ ਧਿਆਵੈਗੋ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jiau anbareek amaraa pad paae satigur mukh bachan dhiaavaigo |2|
lines.english: Ambreek the king was blessed with the status of immortality, meditating on the Word of the True Guru. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸਰਨਿ ਸਰਨਿ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਈ ਸੁਧਾ ਸੁਧਾ ਕਰਿ ਧਿਆਵੈਗੋ ॥
lines.translit: satigur saran saran man bhaaee sudhaa sudhaa kar dhiaavaigo |
lines.english: The Sanctuary, the Protection and Sanctuary of the True Guru is pleasing to the mind. It is sacred and pure - meditate on it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਇਆਲ ਦੀਨ ਭਏ ਹੈ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਹਰਿ ਮਾਰਗੁ ਪੰਥੁ ਦਿਖਾਵੈਗੋ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: deaal deen bhe hai satigur har maarag panth dikhaavaigo |3|
lines.english: The True Guru has become Merciful to the meek and the poor; He has shown me the Path, the Way to the Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸਰਨਿ ਪਏ ਸੇ ਥਾਪੇ ਤਿਨ ਰਾਖਨ ਕਉ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਆਵੈਗੋ ॥
lines.translit: satigur saran pe se thaape tin raakhan kau prabh aavaigo |
lines.english: Those who enter the Sanctuary of the True Guru are firmly established; God comes to protect them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਕੋ ਸਰੁ ਸੰਧੈ ਜਨ ਊਪਰਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਉਲਟੋ ਤਿਸੈ ਲਗਾਵੈਗੋ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: je ko sar sandhai jan aoopar fir ulatto tisai lagaavaigo |4|
lines.english: If someone aims an arrow at the Lord's humble servant, it will turn around and hit him instead. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਸਰੁ ਸੇਵਹਿ ਤਿਨ ਦਰਗਹ ਮਾਨੁ ਦਿਵਾਵੈਗੋ ॥
lines.translit: har har har har har sar seveh tin daragah maan divaavaigo |
lines.english: Those who bathe in the Sacred Pool of the Lord, Har, Har, Har, Har, Har, are blessed with honor in His Court.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਧਿਆਵਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਗਲਿ ਮਿਲਿ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਵੈਗੋ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: guramat guramat guramat dhiaaveh har gal mil mel milaavaigo |5|
lines.english: Those who meditate on the Guru's Teachings, the Guru's Instructions, the Guru's Wisdom, are united in the Lord's Union; He hugs them close in His Embrace. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਰੂਪੁ ਹਰਿ ਰੂਪੋ ਹੋਵੈ ਹਰਿ ਜਨ ਕਉ ਪੂਜ ਕਰਾਵੈਗੋ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: har har roop har roopo hovai har jan kau pooj karaavaigo |6|
lines.english: In the Image of the Lord, Har, Har, one becomes the Embodiment of the Lord. The Lord makes His humble servant worthy of worship. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਦੁ ਬੇਦੁ ਹੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਗੁਰ ਪਰਚੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਵੈਗੋ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh naad bed hai guramukh gur parachai naam dhiaavaigo |
lines.english: The Guru's Word is the Sound-current of the Naad, The Guru's Word is the wisdom of the Vedas; coming in contact with the Guru, meditate on the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਕਤ ਨਰ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਨਹੀ ਕੀਆ ਤੇ ਬੇਮੁਖ ਹਰਿ ਭਰਮਾਵੈਗੋ ॥
lines.translit: saakat nar satigur nahee keea te bemukh har bharamaavaigo |
lines.english: The faithless cynic does not submit to the True Guru; the Lord makes the non-believer wander in confusion.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੋਭ ਲਹਰਿ ਸੁਆਨ ਕੀ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਬਿਖੁ ਮਾਇਆ ਕਰੰਗਿ ਲਗਾਵੈਗੋ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: lobh lehar suaan kee sangat bikh maaeaa karang lagaavaigo |7|
lines.english: The waves of greed are like packs of dogs. The poison of Maya sticks to the body-skeleton. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਭ ਜਗ ਕਾ ਤਾਰਕੁ ਲਗਿ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਵੈਗੋ ॥
lines.translit: raam naam sabh jag kaa taarak lag sangat naam dhiaavaigo |
lines.english: The Lord's Name is the Saving Grace of the whole world; join the Sangat, and meditate on the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਰਾਖੁ ਰਾਖੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਮੇਰੇ ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਰਾਖਿ ਸਮਾਵੈਗੋ ॥੮॥੬॥ ਛਕਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: naanak raakh raakh prabh mere satasangat raakh samaavaigo |8|6| chhakaa 1 |
lines.english: O my God, please protect and preserve Nanak in the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation; save him, and let him merge in You. ||8||6|| First Set of Six ||
